content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible, and the car appears to be on course following the left-hand curve smoothly.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 36 + 5 = 41
Waypoint 41: (6.5267, 2.7296)
Car position: (6.8999, 2.1126)
Bearing = atan2(2.7296 - 2.1126, 6.5267 - 6.8999) = atan2(0.6170, -0.3732)
= 180 - atan2(0.6170, 0.3732) = 180 - 58.8° = 121.2° (second quadrant)
Current heading: 111.58°
Delta = 121.2 - 111.58 = 9.62° → moderate left
